mapper.update: UPDATE trigger_state_record SET triggered = 0, retry_count = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE trigger_code = #{triggerCode}

UPDATE trigger_state_record SET triggered = #{triggered}, instance_id = #{instanceId}, retry_count = retry_count + 1, update_time = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE trigger_code = #{triggerCode} AND version = #{version}
